SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.NInt32

Packages that use NInt32
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.
